name: Varoon Kumar
title: Frontend Developer & Video Editor
intro: I combine design, technology, and storytelling to create impactful digital experiences.
about: I am an aspiring Frontend Developer and Video Editor who enjoys creating engaging digital experiences using modern web technologies and creative storytelling.
I am currently pursuing a Bachelor's in Software Engineering at MUET, while building my skills in React, Tailwind CSS, and web development.
I love combining design, technology, and creativity to craft meaningful and impactful digital products.
summary: Aspiring Frontend Developer and Creative Video Editor with a strong foundation in visual storytelling and modern web technologies. Experienced in freelance video editing, leading videography teams, and producing engaging digital content for organizations and brands. Currently pursuing a Bachelor’s in Software Engineering at MUET, with growing expertise in Typescript, React, Tailwind CSS, and full-stack development. I love combining design, technology, and creativity to build impactful digital experiences.
